title: Senior Software Engineer - Curefit - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Curefit - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Curefit invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Curefit:
Curefit is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit!
